hero.title: Personal finance, one canvas at a time
hero.subtitle: Track income, wallets, expenses, and transfers across multiple currencies. Built for individuals, families, and small businesses.

workflow.title: How it works
workflow.subtitle: Every dollar has a path. eBoom models real money movement through a simple ledger.

canvas.title: Create a canvas
canvas.description: Spin up a scoped workspace for freelancing, family budgeting, or a small business — each with its own base currency.

flows.title: Track money flows
flows.description: Income credits wallets. Expenses debit them. Transfers move funds between accounts — same or cross-currency.

visualize.title: See the big picture
visualize.description: Dashboard charts, a calendar timeline, and an interactive whiteboard graph show where your money goes.

features.title: Everything you need to stay in control
features.subtitle: Live modules that work together inside each canvas.

canvas.title: Canvas workspaces
canvas.description: Multiple financial projects, one login. Switch contexts without mixing data.

incomeExpense.title: Incomes & expenses
incomeExpense.description: Recurring or one-off, multi-currency, with categories and status tracking.

wallets.title: Wallets & transfers
wallets.description: Sub-wallets per currency, unified balances, and cross-currency moves with rates and fees.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Cash-flow charts, yearly heatmap, and recent activity at a glance.

calendarWhiteboard.title: Calendar & whiteboard
calendarWhiteboard.description: Timeline of due dates plus a visual money-flow graph you can edit inline.

collaborate.title: Collaborate & plan
collaborate.description: Invite members with roles, set budgets, and plan ahead together.

tech.title: Built with modern tools
tech.subtitle: A full-stack TypeScript platform — fast UI, reliable API, PostgreSQL at the core.

footer.tagline: Personal finance management for people who want clarity, not complexity.
